artifacts.name: implementer
artifacts.description: Makes failing tests pass with minimal, clean code. GREEN phase of TDD.

artifacts.name: test-writer
artifacts.description: Writes failing tests BEFORE implementation. RED phase of TDD.

artifacts.name: architect
artifacts.description: Makes and documents architectural decisions. Writes ADRs.

artifacts.name: planner
artifacts.description: Breaks specs into ordered subtasks with estimates and dependencies.

artifacts.name: spec-writer
artifacts.description: Turns raw ideas into structured specs with acceptance criteria.

artifacts.name: drafter
artifacts.description: Creates first drafts of content: articles, docs, proposals.

artifacts.name: editor
artifacts.description: Refines drafts for clarity, accuracy, tone, and consistency.

artifacts.name: reviewer-quality
artifacts.description: Reviews code for quality, security (OWASP), performance, and standards.

artifacts.name: reviewer-spec
artifacts.description: Reviews specifications for completeness, clarity, and testability.

artifacts.name: consistency-guardian
artifacts.description: Post-feature sweep: naming, dead code, imports, pattern violations.

artifacts.name: fact-checker
artifacts.description: Verifies factual claims in docs and content against source of truth.

artifacts.name: router
artifacts.description: Entry point for all requests. Classifies and routes to the right workflow.

artifacts.name: docs-writer
artifacts.description: Creates and maintains documentation: READMEs, API docs, PROJECT.md.

artifacts.name: changelog-writer
artifacts.description: Maintains CHANGELOG.md with conventional commit format at every merge.

artifacts.name: onboarder
artifacts.description: Creates and maintains PROJECT.md and ~/.linxmd/user-profile.md.

artifacts.name: brainstormer
artifacts.description: Structured ideation: HMW, SCAMPER, ranking, actionable ideas.

artifacts.name: researcher
artifacts.description: Deep-dives topics, produces structured research reports with sources.

artifacts.name: start-state-creator
artifacts.description: Analyzes existing codebases, generates PROJECT.md and task backlog.

artifacts.name: performance-monitor
artifacts.description: Runs benchmarks, compares to baselines, detects regressions.

artifacts.name: memory-distiller
artifacts.description: Compacts session traces into long-term project memory.

artifacts.name: debugging
artifacts.description: Systematic debugging: reproduce, isolate, fix, verify.

artifacts.name: refactoring
artifacts.description: Safe code transformations with tests as safety net.

artifacts.name: task-management
artifacts.description: Unified task frontmatter v2, lifecycle, and status transitions.

artifacts.name: api-design
artifacts.description: REST/HTTP API design: resources, methods, status codes, pagination.

artifacts.name: project-memory
artifacts.description: Three-tier memory architecture: Session, Project, Global.

artifacts.name: context-management
artifacts.description: LLM context window management: prioritize, summarize, avoid overflow.

artifacts.name: code-translator
artifacts.description: Translate code between languages idiomatically.

artifacts.name: design-tokens
artifacts.description: Design token management: colors, spacing, typography as structured tokens.

artifacts.name: i18n
artifacts.description: Internationalization: string externalization, locale management, RTL.

artifacts.name: text-translator
artifacts.description: Human-language translation preserving tone and cultural context.

artifacts.name: user-profile
artifacts.description: Schema, creation, and maintenance of ~/.linxmd/user-profile.md for agent personalization.

artifacts.name: observability
artifacts.description: Code-level observability: structured logging, tracing, error tracking, health.

artifacts.name: conventional-commits
artifacts.description: Commit message format: type(scope): message. Enforced on every commit.

artifacts.name: trace-writing
artifacts.description: Session trace file format, mandatory content, archival rules.

artifacts.name: preview-delivery
artifacts.description: Preview packages for human acceptance: artifact bundles, live URLs.

artifacts.name: consistency-check
artifacts.description: Naming conventions, dead code, import hygiene, pattern matching.

artifacts.name: performance-profiling
artifacts.description: Before/after benchmarks, regression detection, profiling methodology.

artifacts.name: worktree-management
artifacts.description: Git worktree create, switch, merge, cleanup for isolated work.

artifacts.name: feature-branch
artifacts.description: Branch naming, PR strategy, merge strategy, cleanup.

artifacts.name: e2e-testing
artifacts.description: End-to-end test strategy, Playwright/Cypress, coverage tracking.

artifacts.name: brainstorming
artifacts.description: Structured ideation: HMW, SCAMPER, mind maps, impact/effort ranking.

artifacts.name: research
artifacts.description: Structured research: source collection, synthesis, findings reports.

artifacts.name: market-analysis
artifacts.description: Competitive research, feature gap analysis, positioning frameworks.

artifacts.name: quicknote
artifacts.description: Fast capture of ideas, links, thoughts to .linxmd/notes/.

artifacts.name: start-state-creation
artifacts.description: Codebase analysis, tech stack detection, PROJECT.md generation.

artifacts.name: feature-development
artifacts.description: Primary dev workflow: idea to merge with 6 human gates.

artifacts.name: bug-fix
artifacts.description: Reproduce-first bug fixing with regression tests.

artifacts.name: project-start
artifacts.description: Onboard existing codebases: global env check, analyze, init memory, seed tasks.

artifacts.name: research-spike
artifacts.description: Structured investigation before committing to an approach.

artifacts.name: release
artifacts.description: Version bump, changelog, build, tag, and publish with sign-off.

artifacts.name: consistency-sprint
artifacts.description: Dedicated codebase sweep: dead code, naming, patterns, hygiene.

artifacts.name: content-review
artifacts.description: Content creation: draft, edit, fact-check, publish.

artifacts.name: quality-baseline
artifacts.description: Full project audit: quality, security, performance, documentation.

artifacts.name: fullstack-tdd
artifacts.description: Complete TDD-driven full-stack development bundle.

artifacts.name: quality-sprint
artifacts.description: Codebase cleanup and quality improvement bundle.

artifacts.name: content-pipeline
artifacts.description: Content creation: draft, edit, fact-check, publish.

artifacts.name: i18n-ready
artifacts.description: Internationalization bundle with i18n-aware code review.

artifacts.name: new-project-kickstart
artifacts.description: Start new projects or onboard existing codebases to Linxmd.

artifacts.name: existing-project-rescue
artifacts.description: Rescue neglected codebases: audit, plan, fix, document.
